L. 107–296section 1704(g) of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of Title 10

children.label: a
children.text: Except to the extent otherwise specifically provided in this chapter, the educational assistance programs established by this chapter shall be administered by the Department of Veterans Affairs.

Except to the extent provided in paragraphs (2), (3), and (4), payments for entitlement earned under subchapter II of this chapter shall be made from funds appropriated to, or otherwise available to, the Department of Veterans Affairs for the payment of readjustment benefits and from transfers from the Post-Vietnam Era Veterans Education Account pursuant to .section 3232(b)(2)(B) of this title

Payments for entitlement earned under subchapter II of this chapter that is established under at a rate in excess of the rate prescribed under subsection (a) or (b) of shall, to the extent of that excess, be made from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund established under or from appropriations made to the Department of Homeland Security, as appropriate.section 3015(d) of this titlesection 3015 of this titlesection 2006 of title 10

children.label: A
children.text: except as provided in subparagraphs (B) and (C) of this paragraph, from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund established under ;section 2006 of title 10

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any individual described in section 3018A(a)(3), 3018B(a)(1)(C), or 3018B(a)(2)(C) of this title, from funds appropriated, or otherwise available, to the Department of Veterans Affairs for the payment of readjustment benefits; and

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of the increase in payments made under , from the Post-Vietnam Era Veterans Education Account established pursuant to .section 3015(f) of this titlesection 3222(a) of this title

Payments attributable to the increased usage of benefits as a result of transfers of entitlement to basic educational assistance under shall be made from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund established under or from appropriations made to the Department of Transportation, as appropriate.section 3020 of this titlesection 2006 of title 10

children.label: c
children.text: Payments for educational assistance provided under subchapter III of this chapter shall be made from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund established under or from appropriations made to the Department of Homeland Security, as appropriate.section 2006 of title 10

children.label: d
children.text: Funds for the payment by the Secretary of benefits under this chapter that are to be paid from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund shall be transferred to the Department of Veterans Affairs from such Fund as necessary and in accordance with agreements entered into under by the Secretary, the Secretary of Defense, and the Secretary of the Treasury. Funds for the payment by the Secretary of benefits under this chapter that are to be paid from appropriations made to the Department of Homeland Security shall be transferred to the Department of Veterans Affairs as necessary. The Secretary and the Secretary of Homeland Security shall enter into an agreement for the manner in which such transfers are to be made.section 2006 of title 10

in the case of the first $600 of such benefits paid to an individual, from funds appropriated, or otherwise available, to the Department of Veterans Affairs for the payment of readjustment benefits; and
